canonical_action: move the flaky integration suite off the blocking lane to the preemptible/spot background lane (billed at ~40% of the blocking rate), expecting the discount to cut its compute cost
closure_reason: preemptions interrupt the suite mid-run and re-trigger its automatic retries, so attempts per run balloon and consume the rate discount
measured_outcome: tried on one repo for two weeks: average attempts rose from 2.6 to 7.1 as preemptions re-triggered the flaky retries, wiping the ~60% discount; total spend on the suite rose ~8%; the move was reverted
